summary: Manager Approval Workflow Testing Complete - All features working. Tested approvals page UI, summary cards, filters, search, View Details dialog, Approve/Reject workflows with confirmation dialogs, Safety/Urgent badges, and all API endpoints.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing DialogDescription for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Kiosk requests API uses IN-MEMORY MOCK storage - data will be lost on server restart
External URL (demobackend.emergentagent.com) returns 'Route not found' for /login - routing issue with external proxy (localhost works fine)
seed_data_creation: Mock data seeded in /app/app/api/kiosk/requests/route.ts with 7 requests (5 pending initially)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager Approval Workflow fully tested. Approvals page at /dashboard/hans/approvals. All features working: summary cards, filters (type/status), search, View Details dialog, Approve/Reject workflows with confirmation dialogs. API is MOCKED with in-memory storage.

approvals_page_loads.details: Approval Center title, 5 pending badge, summary cards all visible

pending_requests_count_badge.details: Badge shows '5 pending' initially, updates after approve/reject

request_list_display.details: Shows all pending requests with employee names, timestamps, request type icons

filter_by_type.details: Filters work for stock_order, salary_advance, issue_report

filter_by_status.details: Filters work for pending, approved, rejected, all status

search_functionality.details: Search by employee name, item name, description works

view_details_dialog.details: Shows full request info - employee, timestamp, asset, issue type, location, description

approve_workflow.details: Opens confirmation dialog, optional notes, updates list after approval

reject_workflow.details: Opens confirmation dialog, required reason (button disabled until entered), updates list after rejection

safety_hazard_badge.details: Red 'Safety' badge with warning icon shows for safety issue type

urgent_badge.details: Red 'Urgent' badge shows for urgent stock orders

navigation_sidebar.details: Approvals link in sidebar, highlighted when active

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/kiosk/requests: PASS - Returns all requests with summary
